heroHeadline: Day 44: El País Confirms O3 as New CJNG Leader; Succession Enters Week 7
heroSubtitle: Day 44 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco. El País (April 6) confirmed Juan Carlos Valencia González ('O3') — El Mencho's stepson and Grupo Élite commander — as CJNG's new leader, the most credible international media confirmation of the succession to date. El Jardinero (Audias Flores Silva) remains at large as the primary rival power center with a $5 million U.S. State Department bounty. Operativo Enjambre cumulative total: 67+ officials detained. Operativo Semana Santa Segura 2026 runs through April 12.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, U.S. Treasury (OFAC), InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, Wall Street Journal, El País, France 24, CGTN, Al Jazeera, Latin Times, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, WOLA, Milenio, Excélsior, Proceso, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: April 7, 2026.
